underlying_goal: Plan and execute phase 04.1 of a project roadmap to expose existing services as MCP tools and resources
friction_detail: First plan-phase attempt was routed back because CONTEXT.md was missing; user had to re-invoke after creating it.
brief_summary: User triggered automated plan-phase and execute-phase workflows for phase 04.1 (MCP v1), and all 3 plans across 3 waves were successfully planned, verified, executed, and marked complete.
